info.title: flubu
info.description: This package is deprecated use FlubuCore.Tool instead. Package was just renamed to FlubuCore.Tool because as of .Net Core 3.0 local and global tools exists.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Run's Flubu core in interactive mode

options.name: --parallel
options.description: If applied target's are executed in parallel

options.name: --targetsToExecute
options.description: Target's that must be executed. Otherwise fails.

options.name: --configurationFile
options.description: Path to the Flubu json configuration file. If not specified configuration is read from flubusettings.json

options.name: -ass
options.description: Directory to search assemblies to include automatically in script (Assemblies in subdirectories are also loaded). If not specified assemblies are loaded by default from FlubuLib directory.

options.name: --nodeps
options.description: If applied no target dependencies are executed.

options.name: --dryRun
options.description: Performs a dry run of the specified target.

options.name: --noint
options.description: Disables interactive mode for all task members. Default values are used instead.

options.name: --ci
options.description: Generates configuration file for specified continous integration server. Supported values: Jenkins, AppVeyor, Travis, AzurePipelines, GithubActions
